description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal head with a single wide, curved cutting edge and a slightly flared beard. The blade is securely mounted atop a straight, cylindrical wooden handle that displays a natural wood grain and a slightly bulbous end for improved grip. The handle appears to be made from a dense hardwood, with subtle surface markings and a smooth, matte finish. The axe head is thick and solid, with a wedge-shaped profile and a flat poll opposite the blade, suitable for light hammering tasks. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding, making it suitable for practical use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or maintenance areas. The materials and construction suggest durability and functionality, with a focus on ergonomic handling and effective chopping.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a dark metal blade and a straight wooden handle, featuring a wide curved edge and a smooth, natural wood finish. The design is practical and robust, ideal for chopping or splitting tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the wide, curved blade and the straight wooden handle with visible grain.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow edge of the blade and the circular cross-section of the handle, emphasizing the thickness of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other face of the blade and handle, with the poll of the axe visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the axe head and the end of the handle, showing the attachment point and the handle's rounded end.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with a natural finish, slight bulb at the end for grip, round cross-section, no visible curvature.
attribute_blade_design: Single wide, curved steel blade with a pronounced beard and a flat poll; wedge-shaped profile, no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted over the top of the handle.
